temptationgump.tooltip.locked: Setting can only be changed in the Gypsy Forest
temptationgump.once_tempted: Once you've been tempted, you may never go back. Choose wisely.
temptationgump.help.title: Temptations
temptationgump.help.body:
Command: [Temptations

Temptations will add or change basic gameplay mechanics for your character. You may be tempted by the powerful benefits, but you should take note of the significant drawbacks. Once you've been tempted, you may never go back. Choose wisely.
temptationgump.name.deathwish: It's dangerous to go alone! Take this.
temptationgump.desc.i_can_take_it:
+ You do 10% more damage
x You take 20% more damage
temptationgump.desc.strongest_avenger:
+ You learn how to wear pants
x Enemies cast spells faster
temptationgump.desc.famine:
+ Your stat and skill gain rate is impacted by your Hunger
x Hunger and thirst decay twice as fast
temptationgump.desc.puzzle_master:
+ You learn how to solve puzzle boxes
x Reduced skill cap bonuses for Fugitives (+200) and Titan of Ether quest (+200)
x Magical attributes from monster racial bonuses now act as Minimums. Resist/Stat bonuses still stack.
temptationgump.desc.deathwish:
+ You gain stats and skills faster
- An old sword
x You may never be resurrected
